title: Export pulse into calendar item?
excerpt: We are working on a Monday board and would like to export pulses to go on people’s outlook/teams calendars as events. Is there an easy way to do that?

posts.author: Tricatrica (Tricia Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: We are working on a Monday board and would like to export pulses to go on people’s outlook/teams calendars as events. Is there an easy way to do that?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Tricia,

Have you looked into our calendar integration with Outlook? This way you can sync items with individual outlook calendars automatically

  • Outlook Calendar Integration

Similarly, we have a Microsoft Teams integration and app that you might find relevant, pending the specific information you’d like synced:

  • Microsoft Teams App

  • Microsoft Teams integration
